company_info.name: Elexion Automotive
company_info.description: Elexion manufactures affordable, technology-forward EVs for North America.
company_info.market_position: Elexion is an emerging force in affordable long‑range EVs.

persona.name: Ryan Thompson
persona.responsibilities: Leads the development of competitive intelligence strategies, analyzes market data, informs business decisions.
persona.justification: Ryan's competitive intelligence expertise strengthens strategic analysis.

example_dr_questions: How have EV manufacturers increased dealership visibility through co-marketing programs?
What digital diagnostic practices have reduced warranty load among leading EV brands?
insights: Brands implementing shared promotional budgets with dealerships saw up to a 20% lift in front‑lot placement.
Remote triage and OTA health checks reduced repair-center visits by 25% across three major EV competitors.
